project3.title: Coffee Finder
project3.description: A platform search for coffee shops nearby with a user-friendly interface, real-time updates, and personalized recommendations based on user preferences.

project1.title: Dok Play
project1.description: A User-Friendly registry platform that enables users to manage image & container. Features secure authentication, real-time synchronization, and advanced search capabilities for seamless content organization.

project2.title: Future Dev 2050
project2.description: Search platform for IT learner to find the best resources for learning and provide a tool to help them learn and use it.
